title: Kazakhstan Individual Income Tax Declaration — Schedule 220.06 (Controlled Foreign Company Taxation)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "Форма 220.06 — Налогообложение финансовой прибыли контролируемой иностранной компании" (Form 220.06, controlled-foreign-company (КИК) taxation), Appendix 6 to the Individual Income Tax Declaration (Form 220.00, kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration, GOV-3477). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 220.00 whenever a resident taxpayer must report the financial profit of a controlled foreign company (КИК) or a controlled foreign company's permanent establishment (ПУ КИК), the profit tax (foreign income tax) creditable against it, and the individual income tax withheld or paid on income sourced from such CFCs. Approved within Appendix 9 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025 — the same combined appendix that houses the main Form 220.00 declaration and all ten of its companion schedules (220.01 through 220.10) — published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 220.06 in full across its six printed pages: the taxpayer-identification header (repeated on every sheet, with a sheet-numbering box) and 18 individual CFC/PE-entry rows, each capturing the CFC or PE's identity, country, registration, participation coefficient, foreign-currency financial profit and loss carry-forward, a ten-part statutory reductions breakdown, the adjusted and taxable profit in both foreign and national currency, and the foreign profit tax amounts and resulting Kazakhstan tax credit. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

verification.notes:
GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3568, deepening Kazakhstan's Taxes vertical by authoring the sixth of the ten disclosed companion schedules to Form 220.00 (Form 220.06, controlled-foreign-company taxation), the largest remaining companion schedule per the parent Form 220.00 schema's own disclosed boundary table (images 182-187, 6 pages). Independently re-fetched this cycle: https://adilet.zan.kz/rus/docs/V2500037390 (HTTP 200 via curl -k, 2,660,117 bytes, sha256 db1db6a1893b8b75e3c827f7c5eb6d99b460df978439822ba85800aeff7524b0). A genuine, live, site-wide outage on the image-serving endpoint (adilet.zan.kz/rus/docs/V2500037390/files/1576/49/*.jpg) — the same transient "Ведутся технические работы" (technical maintenance) placeholder outage already documented in the immediately preceding GOV-3558 cycle's own VERIFICATION.md — was hit again this cycle for images 182.jpg and 183.jpg specifically (repeated attempts over the session, spaced with delays, with a fresh cookie and a browser-like User-Agent/Referer, all returning HTTP 404 with the identical maintenance-placeholder HTML body, 19,530 bytes, sha256 4ccb02bc8f6764e4e1b2e4802efc008755959bb3f2b08cbec746f057ee682577). Images 184.jpg through 188.jpg, by contrast, were successfully fetched fresh this cycle as real JPEGs (confirmed via JFIF magic bytes) before or outside the outage window affecting only 182/183: 184.jpg sha256 beca7c49f6504d9e1d454ce565b37914f57d699cc7604f8aa6912cb726a1d56f (168,228 bytes), 185.jpg sha256 459a37ed76af0da96aed67d91e370d40a7ece61d1cfa954aa9caf2ad621f1dd3 (166,957 bytes), 186.jpg sha256 f6a68da7d04d28e828763568b8342a9875d9ebb3f6512e97584eaf5815e20a3e (169,424 bytes), 187.jpg sha256 e107eff9940ee33a7245592f20c05177a2f3d04c85254d09cad9b00ead7ff770 (173,072 bytes), 188.jpg sha256 936e32807230d4908bf0bc6898570c67dc31a59ba793b056726245c52542ed9c (113,814 bytes, retained only to confirm the far-end boundary).

Boundary confirmation: image 184.jpg's own printed header reads directly and unambiguously "форма 220.06 стр.03" with subtitle "(Приложение 6 к Декларации)"; 185.jpg reads "форма 220.06 стр.04"; 186.jpg reads "форма 220.06 стр.05"; 187.jpg reads "форма 220.06 стр.06". Image 188.jpg's own header reads "форма 220.07 стр.01" with title "БЕЗВОЗМЕЗДНО ПОЛУЧЕННОЕ (ПЕРЕДАННОЕ) ИМУЩЕСТВО..." — directly confirming the far-end boundary (Form 220.07 begins at image 188, not a continuation of 220.06), corroborating the parent Form 220.00 schema's own disclosed page-count estimate ("220.06 (CFC taxation) — images 182-187, 6 pages") and resolving as independently re-confirmed the exact gap the GOV-3558 cycle's own VERIFICATION.md flagged as unconfirmed ("a future cycle authoring Form 220.06 should independently re-confirm image 182 once the site's image endpoint recovers").

Images 182.jpg (стр.01) and 183.jpg (стр.02) could not be fetched fresh this cycle due to the live outage described above, and no cached copies of these two specific images were found in any /tmp scratch directory salvageable from a prior cycle (checked /tmp/kz22004, /tmp/kz220, /tmp/gov3554-verify, /tmp/kz22005 — none had fetched past image 181 prior to this cycle, since Form 220.06 had not yet been authored). This is a genuine, disclosed gap: the two page images covering this schedule's taxpayer-identification header layout on page 1 and columns B-E, F-I(main) of the "Информация о КИК и ПУ КИК" entity table could not be visually confirmed this cycle.

This gap was substantially mitigated by two independent, converging sources that do not depend on the image fetch: (1) the Order's own Rules text (see below), fetched fresh via the HTML page (which stayed up throughout the outage, matching every prior cycle's own experience), gives a complete field-by-field walkthrough of every column A through O via Item 36(1)-(15) — including columns B through I(main), the columns that would appear on the missing pages 182-183; (2) a strong structural pattern independently confirmed across the four successfully-fetched pages 184-187: each page holds exactly 4 column-groups repeating the same taxpayer-header and row-ordinal column A (184/стр.03 = I-1..I-4; 185/стр.04 = I-5..I-8; 186/стр.05 = I-9,I-10,J,K; 187/стр.06 = L,M,N,O — 16 columns total across 4 pages, exactly matching the 16 remaining columns after B,C,D,E,F,G,H,I(main) = 8 columns). This directly implies, with high confidence but not itself image-verified, that page 182 (стр.01) holds columns A,B,C,D,E and page 183 (стр.02) holds A,F,G,H,I(main) — continuing the same 4-column-per-page pattern from the start of the table. This schema's field order and column-to-page assignment follows that inference; a future cycle should independently re-confirm images 182-183 once the site's image endpoint recovers, per this same registry's established practice of flagging rather than silently guessing at unconfirmed boundaries.

Row-count determination (18 individual CFC/PE-entry rows, no separate grand-total row): confirmed on image 184.jpg two independent ways: (1) a direct visual count of zoomed crops of column A's row-number boxes, in three 3-row groups (rows 1-3, 10-12, 16-18) plus whole-column views, counting 18 distinct row-height boxes — 1 pre-printed sample row reading "000001" (the row-ordinal control, not applicant data, consistent with the established convention that column A is not modeled as a field) followed by 17 blank entry-ordinal rows, all evenly spaced within the visible table area above the page's own footer barcode; (2) a pixel-luminance row-boundary scan (a small Node script reading raw pixel data via the sharp npm package, reused from /tmp/kz22004/node_modules and /tmp/kz220's own cached fetches) down column A's box area, detecting a consistent ~23-26px row pitch across a ~468px table-content span, dividing evenly into exactly 18 rows (468/18 = 26.0px, confirmed by re-cropping in 3-row groups at that exact pitch and checking box-grid alignment held cleanly with no drift). Both methods agree. This is one more row than the immediately preceding Form 220.05's 11-row table and one more than Form 220.04's 17-row table, consistent with this being the largest companion schedule in page count.

Column layout, confirmed directly from images 184-187 and the Rules text: A (№, row ordinal, not modeled), B (Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК), C (Код страны), D (номер государственной/налоговой регистрации), E (коэффициент участия/контроля), F (Код валюты), G (положительная финансовая прибыль до налогообложения, иностранная валюта), H (сумма убытков КИК/ПУ КИК за 2 предыдущих периода), I (сумма уменьшений, иностранная валюта, main/aggregate column) with I-1 through I-10 as ten sub-columns breaking the reduction down by subparagraph 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, J (G − H − I), K (положительная величина, J × E), L (K пересчитанная в национальной валюте), M (сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности, иностранная валюта), N (сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль, иностранная валюта), O (сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая зачету, национальная валюта). The Order's own Rules text (Глава 8, Items 34-36) gives the complete field-by-field walkthrough for all of these columns, including the two carry-over instructions at the end of Item 36: the total value of column L is carried to line 220.01.045 of kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01, and the total value of column O is carried to line 220.01.058 I of the same schedule — both disclosed in this schema's own field descriptions for columns L and O rather than modeled as separate derived fields (consistent with this registry's established practice of scoping out cross-schedule derived/carry-over totals, e.g. GOV-3531's ua/dps cycle).

External classifiers not modelled as enums, per this registry's established discipline: column C (country code) and column F (currency code) both reference Items 56 and 55 respectively of the same Rules document, which in turn point to external classifiers ("Классификатор стран мира", Annex 22, and "Классификатор валют", Annex 23, both to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010) — the same classifiers already correctly cited (and not fabricated as enums) in the GOV-3551 cycle's own kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-04 schema. Both are modelled here as plain 3-digit-numeric-pattern strings (^[0-9]{3}$), matching that schema's own established pattern, not as enums. Column B's own definitional cross-reference (Article 332 of the Tax Code, defining КИК/ПУ КИК) and column E's own calculation-method cross-reference (paragraph 8 of Article 335 of the Tax Code) are likewise external statutory references not reproduced inline in this Order's text, and are disclosed in the relevant fields' own descriptions rather than modelled as constrained fields.

documentRef citation: this schema cites "Приложение 9 к приказу ... — форма 220.06", matching Form 220.00/220.01's own already-correct citation and the GOV-3558 cycle's own independently re-derived and cross-checked conclusion (not the increment-by-one "Приложение 10/11/12" pattern already confirmed as a citation bug in the merged Forms 220.02/220.03/220.04 schemas, filed as open follow-up GOV-3562). This cycle did not re-derive the enacting-clause cross-check from scratch — it relies on the GOV-3558 cycle's own already-independently-verified conclusion, which itself cross-checked the Order's own "ПРИКАЗЫВАЮ" enacting clause against the HTML content stream's single "Приложение 9" header immediately preceding the entire 220-series scanned-image bundle.

Verification method: manual-source-review-v1 — a human/agent read the primary source directly (as scanned page images 184-187, fetched fresh this cycle, plus the Order's own HTML Rules text, Items 34-36, also fetched fresh this cycle) and transcribed its fields; images 182-183 were not independently visually confirmed this cycle due to a live site outage and are instead inferred from the Rules text and a strongly corroborated structural pattern across the confirmed pages, as disclosed above. No automated re-verification tooling exists yet for this schema; nextReviewBy is set 6 months out per the practice's default cadence. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The taxpayer's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 220.00 declaration this schedule is attached to. If the tax obligation is performed by a trust manager, this line shows the trust manager's own IIN instead.

fields.name: taxPeriodYear
fields.label: Налоговый период, за который представляется налоговая отчетность: год
fields.description: The calendar year of the tax period for which this schedule is filed.

fields.name: currentSheetNumber
fields.label: Укажите номер текущего листа
fields.description: The sequential sheet number of this physical page, printed in a boxed header field distinct from the numbered Item 1/2 fields — used when a taxpayer's CFC/PE entries exceed this schedule's single-sheet 18-row capacity and require additional continuation sheets of the same form.

fields.name: entry1EntityName
fields.label: Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК
fields.description: The name of the controlled foreign company (КИК) or permanent establishment of a controlled foreign company (ПУ КИК) reported in entry row 1 (column B), per Item 36(2) of the Order's own Rules. The definitions of КИК and ПУ КИК are given in Article 332 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text). If the taxpayer controls more than one CFC or CFC permanent establishment, each is listed on its own row.

fields.name: entry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the country in which the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1 is created (incorporated) and tax-resident (column C), per Item 36(3) of the Order's own Rules. If the CFC/PE is created in one country but resident in another, the code of the country of creation (incorporation) is used. Per Item 56 of the same Rules document, this uses the same external "Классификатор стран мира" (Annex 22 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010) classifier already established for this registry's other Form 220.0X country-code fields — not enumerated inline on this form. For a CFC/PE registered in a preferentially-taxed state included in the list approved by Order No. 142, the code is instead that state's own sequence number in that separate list.

fields.name: entry1RegistrationNumber
fields.label: Номер государственной (налоговой) регистрации
fields.description: The state (tax) registration number of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1 in its country of creation (incorporation) (column D), per Item 36(4) of the Order's own Rules. Where a CFC/PE has both a state registration number and a separate tax registration number, the tax registration number is used.

fields.name: entry1ParticipationCoefficient
fields.label: Коэффициент участия/контроля
fields.description: The overall coefficient (percentage) of the resident taxpayer's direct, indirect, or constructive participation in, or control of, the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1 (column E), whether held/controlled independently or through a controlled person, determined per paragraph 8 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference for the calculation method, not reproduced inline in this Order's text), per Item 36(5) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry1CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the currency of the financial profit reported in column G for entry row 1 (column F), per Item 36(6) of the Order's own Rules, which cites Item 55 of the same Rules document — an external classifier ("Классификатор валют", Annex 23 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010), not enumerated inline on this form or in its Rules text.

fields.name: entry1ForeignProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль до налогообложения (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit before taxation of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1, determined per paragraphs 2 and 3 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency (column G), per Item 36(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry1PriorLossesAmount
fields.label: Сумма убытков КИК или ПУ КИК за два предыдущих периода
fields.description: The amount of losses of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1, arising in the two tax periods immediately preceding the reporting period, per paragraph 1 of Article 339 of the Tax Code (reduced losses in subsequent periods are not taken into account) (column H), per Item 36(8) of the Order's own Rules. A resident is not entitled to use losses of a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state.

fields.name: entry1ReductionsAmount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшений (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The total amount of reductions made from the financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1, per paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in paragraph 11 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column I), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. If the resident taxpayer does not apply paragraph 4 of Article 297 of the Tax Code, this column reads "0".

fields.name: entry1Reduction1Amount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 1) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 1) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-1), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.name: entry1Reduction2Amount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 2) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 2) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-2), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 4) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 4) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-4), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.name: entry1Reduction5Amount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 5) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 5) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-5), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.name: entry1Reduction6Amount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 6) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 6) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-6), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 7) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 7) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-7), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.name: entry1Reduction8Amount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 8) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 8) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-8), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.name: entry1Reduction9Amount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 9) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 9) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-9), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.name: entry1Reduction10Amount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшения по подпункту 10) пункта 5 статьи 335 Налогового кодекса
fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 1 (column I-10), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.name: entry1AdjustedProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль с учетом уменьшений и убытков (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1, before taxation, adjusted for the reductions and losses reported in columns G, H, and I of the same row, in foreign currency, determined as the difference between columns G, H, and I (column G − column H − column I) (column J), per Item 36(10) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry1TaxableProfitForeignAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1 that is subject to taxation in the Republic of Kazakhstan, in foreign currency, determined as the product of columns J and E (column J × column E) (column K), per Item 36(11) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry1TaxableProfitNationalAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit reported in column K for entry row 1, recalculated into national currency (tenge) per paragraph 7 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column L), per Item 36(12) of the Order's own Rules. The total value of column L across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.045 of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry1ForeignProfitTaxAmount
fields.label: Сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in that paragraph (column M), per Item 36(13) of the Order's own Rules. This amount includes tax withheld at source in the reporting period where the CFC's or PE's pre-tax financial profit included, in the current or a preceding period, income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: entry1ForeignProfitTaxPaidAmount
fields.label: Сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 1, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code and actually paid in the foreign state for the reporting period, in foreign currency, conditional on supporting documents (column N), per Item 36(14) of the Order's own Rules. If this differs from the amount in column M, the amount actually paid is used; if the profit was taxed in two or more foreign states, only the amount paid with the highest effective rate is shown here.

fields.name: entry1TaxCreditAmount
fields.label: Сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая отнесению в зачет (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of foreign profit tax subject to tax credit per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in national currency (tenge), for entry row 1 — the smaller of the amounts in columns M and N, recalculated into national currency using the average market exchange rate for the reporting period (if column M's amount governs) or the market exchange rate on the date such foreign profit tax was paid (if column N's amount governs) (column O), per Item 36(15) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. The total value of column O across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.058 I of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry2EntityName
fields.label: Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК
fields.description: The name of the controlled foreign company (КИК) or permanent establishment of a controlled foreign company (ПУ КИК) reported in entry row 2 (column B), per Item 36(2) of the Order's own Rules. The definitions of КИК and ПУ КИК are given in Article 332 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text). If the taxpayer controls more than one CFC or CFC permanent establishment, each is listed on its own row.

fields.name: entry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the country in which the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 2 is created (incorporated) and tax-resident (column C), per Item 36(3) of the Order's own Rules. fields.description: The state (tax) registration number of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6 in its country of creation (incorporation) (column D), per Item 36(4) of the Order's own Rules. Where a CFC/PE has both a state registration number and a separate tax registration number, the tax registration number is used.

fields.name: entry6ParticipationCoefficient
fields.label: Коэффициент участия/контроля
fields.description: The overall coefficient (percentage) of the resident taxpayer's direct, indirect, or constructive participation in, or control of, the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6 (column E), whether held/controlled independently or through a controlled person, determined per paragraph 8 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference for the calculation method, not reproduced inline in this Order's text), per Item 36(5) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry6CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the currency of the financial profit reported in column G for entry row 6 (column F), per Item 36(6) of the Order's own Rules, which cites Item 55 of the same Rules document — an external classifier ("Классификатор валют", Annex 23 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010), not enumerated inline on this form or in its Rules text.

fields.name: entry6ForeignProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль до налогообложения (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit before taxation of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6, determined per paragraphs 2 and 3 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency (column G), per Item 36(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry6PriorLossesAmount
fields.label: Сумма убытков КИК или ПУ КИК за два предыдущих периода
fields.description: The amount of losses of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6, arising in the two tax periods immediately preceding the reporting period, per paragraph 1 of Article 339 of the Tax Code (reduced losses in subsequent periods are not taken into account) (column H), per Item 36(8) of the Order's own Rules. A resident is not entitled to use losses of a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state.

fields.name: entry6ReductionsAmount
fields.label: Сумма уменьшений (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The total amount of reductions made from the financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6, per paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in paragraph 11 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column I), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. If the resident taxpayer does not apply paragraph 4 of Article 297 of the Tax Code, this column reads "0".

fields.name: entry6Reduction1Amount

fields.description: The amount of the reduction made under subparagraph 1) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, for entry row 6 (column I-1), per Item 36(9) of the Order's own Rules. This is one of ten sub-breakdowns (I-1 through I-10) of column I's total reductions amount; subparagraphs 1)-10) of paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code are an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text.

fields.name: entry6AdjustedProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль с учетом уменьшений и убытков (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6, before taxation, adjusted for the reductions and losses reported in columns G, H, and I of the same row, in foreign currency, determined as the difference between columns G, H, and I (column G − column H − column I) (column J), per Item 36(10) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry6TaxableProfitForeignAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6 that is subject to taxation in the Republic of Kazakhstan, in foreign currency, determined as the product of columns J and E (column J × column E) (column K), per Item 36(11) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry6TaxableProfitNationalAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit reported in column K for entry row 6, recalculated into national currency (tenge) per paragraph 7 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column L), per Item 36(12) of the Order's own Rules. The total value of column L across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.045 of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry6ForeignProfitTaxAmount
fields.label: Сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in that paragraph (column M), per Item 36(13) of the Order's own Rules. This amount includes tax withheld at source in the reporting period where the CFC's or PE's pre-tax financial profit included, in the current or a preceding period, income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: entry6ForeignProfitTaxPaidAmount
fields.label: Сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 6, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code and actually paid in the foreign state for the reporting period, in foreign currency, conditional on supporting documents (column N), per Item 36(14) of the Order's own Rules. If this differs from the amount in column M, the amount actually paid is used; if the profit was taxed in two or more foreign states, only the amount paid with the highest effective rate is shown here.

fields.name: entry6TaxCreditAmount
fields.label: Сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая отнесению в зачет (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of foreign profit tax subject to tax credit per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in national currency (tenge), for entry row 6 — the smaller of the amounts in columns M and N, recalculated into national currency using the average market exchange rate for the reporting period (if column M's amount governs) or the market exchange rate on the date such foreign profit tax was paid (if column N's amount governs) (column O), per Item 36(15) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. The total value of column O across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.058 I of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry7EntityName
fields.label: Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК
fields.description: The name of the controlled foreign company (КИК) or permanent establishment of a controlled foreign company (ПУ КИК) reported in entry row 7 (column B), per Item 36(2) of the Order's own Rules. The definitions of КИК and ПУ КИК are given in Article 332 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text). If the taxpayer controls more than one CFC or CFC permanent establishment, each is listed on its own row.

fields.name: entry7CountryCode

If the CFC/PE is created in one country but resident in another, the code of the country of creation (incorporation) is used. Per Item 56 of the same Rules document, this uses the same external "Классификатор стран мира" (Annex 22 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010) classifier already established for this registry's other Form 220.0X country-code fields — not enumerated inline on this form. fields.label: Финансовая прибыль с учетом уменьшений и убытков (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 8, before taxation, adjusted for the reductions and losses reported in columns G, H, and I of the same row, in foreign currency, determined as the difference between columns G, H, and I (column G − column H − column I) (column J), per Item 36(10) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry8TaxableProfitForeignAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 8 that is subject to taxation in the Republic of Kazakhstan, in foreign currency, determined as the product of columns J and E (column J × column E) (column K), per Item 36(11) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry8TaxableProfitNationalAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit reported in column K for entry row 8, recalculated into national currency (tenge) per paragraph 7 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column L), per Item 36(12) of the Order's own Rules. The total value of column L across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.045 of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry8ForeignProfitTaxAmount
fields.label: Сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 8, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in that paragraph (column M), per Item 36(13) of the Order's own Rules. This amount includes tax withheld at source in the reporting period where the CFC's or PE's pre-tax financial profit included, in the current or a preceding period, income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: entry8ForeignProfitTaxPaidAmount
fields.label: Сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 8, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code and actually paid in the foreign state for the reporting period, in foreign currency, conditional on supporting documents (column N), per Item 36(14) of the Order's own Rules. If this differs from the amount in column M, the amount actually paid is used; if the profit was taxed in two or more foreign states, only the amount paid with the highest effective rate is shown here.

fields.name: entry8TaxCreditAmount
fields.label: Сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая отнесению в зачет (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of foreign profit tax subject to tax credit per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in national currency (tenge), for entry row 8 — the smaller of the amounts in columns M and N, recalculated into national currency using the average market exchange rate for the reporting period (if column M's amount governs) or the market exchange rate on the date such foreign profit tax was paid (if column N's amount governs) (column O), per Item 36(15) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. The total value of column O across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.058 I of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry9EntityName
fields.label: Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК
fields.description: The name of the controlled foreign company (КИК) or permanent establishment of a controlled foreign company (ПУ КИК) reported in entry row 9 (column B), per Item 36(2) of the Order's own Rules. The definitions of КИК and ПУ КИК are given in Article 332 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text). If the taxpayer controls more than one CFC or CFC permanent establishment, each is listed on its own row.

fields.name: entry9CountryCode

If the CFC/PE is created in one country but resident in another, the code of the country of creation (incorporation) is used. Per Item 56 of the same Rules document, this uses the same external "Классификатор стран мира" (Annex 22 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010) classifier already established for this registry's other Form 220.0X country-code fields — not enumerated inline on this form. For a CFC/PE registered in a preferentially-taxed state included in the list approved by Order No. 142, the code is instead that state's own sequence number in that separate list.

A resident may not apply paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. fields.name: entry10AdjustedProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль с учетом уменьшений и убытков (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 10, before taxation, adjusted for the reductions and losses reported in columns G, H, and I of the same row, in foreign currency, determined as the difference between columns G, H, and I (column G − column H − column I) (column J), per Item 36(10) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry10TaxableProfitForeignAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 10 that is subject to taxation in the Republic of Kazakhstan, in foreign currency, determined as the product of columns J and E (column J × column E) (column K), per Item 36(11) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry10TaxableProfitNationalAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit reported in column K for entry row 10, recalculated into national currency (tenge) per paragraph 7 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column L), per Item 36(12) of the Order's own Rules. The total value of column L across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.045 of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry10ForeignProfitTaxAmount
fields.label: Сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 10, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in that paragraph (column M), per Item 36(13) of the Order's own Rules. This amount includes tax withheld at source in the reporting period where the CFC's or PE's pre-tax financial profit included, in the current or a preceding period, income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: entry10ForeignProfitTaxPaidAmount
fields.label: Сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 10, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code and actually paid in the foreign state for the reporting period, in foreign currency, conditional on supporting documents (column N), per Item 36(14) of the Order's own Rules. If this differs from the amount in column M, the amount actually paid is used; if the profit was taxed in two or more foreign states, only the amount paid with the highest effective rate is shown here.

fields.name: entry10TaxCreditAmount
fields.label: Сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая отнесению в зачет (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of foreign profit tax subject to tax credit per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in national currency (tenge), for entry row 10 — the smaller of the amounts in columns M and N, recalculated into national currency using the average market exchange rate for the reporting period (if column M's amount governs) or the market exchange rate on the date such foreign profit tax was paid (if column N's amount governs) (column O), per Item 36(15) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. The total value of column O across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.058 I of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry11EntityName
fields.label: Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК
fields.description: The name of the controlled foreign company (КИК) or permanent establishment of a controlled foreign company (ПУ КИК) reported in entry row 11 (column B), per Item 36(2) of the Order's own Rules. The definitions of КИК and ПУ КИК are given in Article 332 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text). If the taxpayer controls more than one CFC or CFC permanent establishment, each is listed on its own row.

fields.name: entry11CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the country in which the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 11 is created (incorporated) and tax-resident (column C), per Item 36(3) of the Order's own Rules. If the CFC/PE is created in one country but resident in another, the code of the country of creation (incorporation) is used. Per Item 56 of the same Rules document, this uses the same external "Классификатор стран мира" (Annex 22 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010) classifier already established for this registry's other Form 220.0X country-code fields — not enumerated inline on this form. For a CFC/PE registered in a preferentially-taxed state included in the list approved by Order No. 142, the code is instead that state's own sequence number in that separate list.

fields.name: entry11RegistrationNumber
fields.label: Номер государственной (налоговой) регистрации
fields.description: The state (tax) registration number of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 11 in its country of creation (incorporation) (column D), per Item 36(4) of the Order's own Rules. Where a CFC/PE has both a state registration number and a separate tax registration number, the tax registration number is used.

fields.name: entry11ParticipationCoefficient
fields.label: Коэффициент участия/контроля
fields.description: The overall coefficient (percentage) of the resident taxpayer's direct, indirect, or constructive participation in, or control of, the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 11 (column E), whether held/controlled independently or through a controlled person, determined per paragraph 8 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference for the calculation method, not reproduced inline in this Order's text), per Item 36(5) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit before taxation of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 12, determined per paragraphs 2 and 3 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency (column G), per Item 36(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry12PriorLossesAmount
fields.label: Сумма убытков КИК или ПУ КИК за два предыдущих периода

A resident is not entitled to use losses of a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state.

A resident may not apply paragraph 5 of Article 335 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. If the resident taxpayer does not apply paragraph 4 of Article 297 of the Tax Code, this column reads "0".

fields.name: entry12AdjustedProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль с учетом уменьшений и убытков (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 12, before taxation, adjusted for the reductions and losses reported in columns G, H, and I of the same row, in foreign currency, determined as the difference between columns G, H, and I (column G − column H − column I) (column J), per Item 36(10) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry12TaxableProfitForeignAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 12 that is subject to taxation in the Republic of Kazakhstan, in foreign currency, determined as the product of columns J and E (column J × column E) (column K), per Item 36(11) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry12TaxableProfitNationalAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit reported in column K for entry row 12, recalculated into national currency (tenge) per paragraph 7 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column L), per Item 36(12) of the Order's own Rules. The total value of column L across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.045 of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry12ForeignProfitTaxAmount
fields.label: Сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 12, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in that paragraph (column M), per Item 36(13) of the Order's own Rules. This amount includes tax withheld at source in the reporting period where the CFC's or PE's pre-tax financial profit included, in the current or a preceding period, income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: entry12ForeignProfitTaxPaidAmount
fields.label: Сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 12, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code and actually paid in the foreign state for the reporting period, in foreign currency, conditional on supporting documents (column N), per Item 36(14) of the Order's own Rules. If this differs from the amount in column M, the amount actually paid is used; if the profit was taxed in two or more foreign states, only the amount paid with the highest effective rate is shown here.

fields.name: entry12TaxCreditAmount
fields.label: Сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая отнесению в зачет (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of foreign profit tax subject to tax credit per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in national currency (tenge), for entry row 12 — the smaller of the amounts in columns M and N, recalculated into national currency using the average market exchange rate for the reporting period (if column M's amount governs) or the market exchange rate on the date such foreign profit tax was paid (if column N's amount governs) (column O), per Item 36(15) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. The total value of column O across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.058 I of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry13EntityName
fields.label: Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК
fields.description: The name of the controlled foreign company (КИК) or permanent establishment of a controlled foreign company (ПУ КИК) reported in entry row 13 (column B), per Item 36(2) of the Order's own Rules. The definitions of КИК and ПУ КИК are given in Article 332 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text). If the taxpayer controls more than one CFC or CFC permanent establishment, each is listed on its own row.

fields.name: entry13CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the country in which the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 13 is created (incorporated) and tax-resident (column C), per Item 36(3) of the Order's own Rules. If the CFC/PE is created in one country but resident in another, the code of the country of creation (incorporation) is used. Per Item 56 of the same Rules document, this uses the same external "Классификатор стран мира" (Annex 22 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010) classifier already established for this registry's other Form 220.0X country-code fields — not enumerated inline on this form. For a CFC/PE registered in a preferentially-taxed state included in the list approved by Order No. 142, the code is instead that state's own sequence number in that separate list.

fields.name: entry13RegistrationNumber
fields.label: Номер государственной (налоговой) регистрации
fields.description: The state (tax) registration number of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 13 in its country of creation (incorporation) (column D), per Item 36(4) of the Order's own Rules. Where a CFC/PE has both a state registration number and a separate tax registration number, the tax registration number is used.

fields.name: entry13ParticipationCoefficient
fields.label: Коэффициент участия/контроля
fields.description: The overall coefficient (percentage) of the resident taxpayer's direct, indirect, or constructive participation in, or control of, the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 13 (column E), whether held/controlled independently or through a controlled person, determined per paragraph 8 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference for the calculation method, not reproduced inline in this Order's text), per Item 36(5) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry13CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the currency of the financial profit reported in column G for entry row 13 (column F), per Item 36(6) of the Order's own Rules, which cites Item 55 of the same Rules document — an external classifier ("Классификатор валют", Annex 23 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010), not enumerated inline on this form or in its Rules text.

fields.name: entry14AdjustedProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль с учетом уменьшений и убытков (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 14, before taxation, adjusted for the reductions and losses reported in columns G, H, and I of the same row, in foreign currency, determined as the difference between columns G, H, and I (column G − column H − column I) (column J), per Item 36(10) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry14TaxableProfitForeignAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 14 that is subject to taxation in the Republic of Kazakhstan, in foreign currency, determined as the product of columns J and E (column J × column E) (column K), per Item 36(11) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry14TaxableProfitNationalAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit reported in column K for entry row 14, recalculated into national currency (tenge) per paragraph 7 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column L), per Item 36(12) of the Order's own Rules. The total value of column L across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.045 of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry14ForeignProfitTaxAmount
fields.label: Сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 14, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in that paragraph (column M), per Item 36(13) of the Order's own Rules. This amount includes tax withheld at source in the reporting period where the CFC's or PE's pre-tax financial profit included, in the current or a preceding period, income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: entry14ForeignProfitTaxPaidAmount
fields.label: Сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 14, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code and actually paid in the foreign state for the reporting period, in foreign currency, conditional on supporting documents (column N), per Item 36(14) of the Order's own Rules. If this differs from the amount in column M, the amount actually paid is used; if the profit was taxed in two or more foreign states, only the amount paid with the highest effective rate is shown here.

fields.name: entry14TaxCreditAmount
fields.label: Сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая отнесению в зачет (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of foreign profit tax subject to tax credit per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in national currency (tenge), for entry row 14 — the smaller of the amounts in columns M and N, recalculated into national currency using the average market exchange rate for the reporting period (if column M's amount governs) or the market exchange rate on the date such foreign profit tax was paid (if column N's amount governs) (column O), per Item 36(15) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. The total value of column O across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.058 I of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry15EntityName
fields.label: Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК
fields.description: The name of the controlled foreign company (КИК) or permanent establishment of a controlled foreign company (ПУ КИК) reported in entry row 15 (column B), per Item 36(2) of the Order's own Rules. The definitions of КИК and ПУ КИК are given in Article 332 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text). If the taxpayer controls more than one CFC or CFC permanent establishment, each is listed on its own row.

fields.name: entry15CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the country in which the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 15 is created (incorporated) and tax-resident (column C), per Item 36(3) of the Order's own Rules. If the CFC/PE is created in one country but resident in another, the code of the country of creation (incorporation) is used. Per Item 56 of the same Rules document, this uses the same external "Классификатор стран мира" (Annex 22 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010) classifier already established for this registry's other Form 220.0X country-code fields — not enumerated inline on this form. For a CFC/PE registered in a preferentially-taxed state included in the list approved by Order No. 142, the code is instead that state's own sequence number in that separate list.

fields.name: entry15RegistrationNumber
fields.label: Номер государственной (налоговой) регистрации
fields.description: The state (tax) registration number of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 15 in its country of creation (incorporation) (column D), per Item 36(4) of the Order's own Rules. Where a CFC/PE has both a state registration number and a separate tax registration number, the tax registration number is used.

fields.name: entry15ParticipationCoefficient
fields.label: Коэффициент участия/контроля
fields.description: The overall coefficient (percentage) of the resident taxpayer's direct, indirect, or constructive participation in, or control of, the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 15 (column E), whether held/controlled independently or through a controlled person, determined per paragraph 8 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference for the calculation method, not reproduced inline in this Order's text), per Item 36(5) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry15CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the currency of the financial profit reported in column G for entry row 15 (column F), per Item 36(6) of the Order's own Rules, which cites Item 55 of the same Rules document — an external classifier ("Классификатор валют", Annex 23 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010), not enumerated inline on this form or in its Rules text.

fields.name: entry15ForeignProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль до налогообложения (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit before taxation of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 15, determined per paragraphs 2 and 3 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency (column G), per Item 36(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry16AdjustedProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль с учетом уменьшений и убытков (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 16, before taxation, adjusted for the reductions and losses reported in columns G, H, and I of the same row, in foreign currency, determined as the difference between columns G, H, and I (column G − column H − column I) (column J), per Item 36(10) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry16TaxableProfitForeignAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 16 that is subject to taxation in the Republic of Kazakhstan, in foreign currency, determined as the product of columns J and E (column J × column E) (column K), per Item 36(11) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry16TaxableProfitNationalAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit reported in column K for entry row 16, recalculated into national currency (tenge) per paragraph 7 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column L), per Item 36(12) of the Order's own Rules. The total value of column L across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.045 of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry16ForeignProfitTaxAmount
fields.label: Сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 16, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in that paragraph (column M), per Item 36(13) of the Order's own Rules. This amount includes tax withheld at source in the reporting period where the CFC's or PE's pre-tax financial profit included, in the current or a preceding period, income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: entry16ForeignProfitTaxPaidAmount
fields.label: Сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 16, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code and actually paid in the foreign state for the reporting period, in foreign currency, conditional on supporting documents (column N), per Item 36(14) of the Order's own Rules. If this differs from the amount in column M, the amount actually paid is used; if the profit was taxed in two or more foreign states, only the amount paid with the highest effective rate is shown here.

fields.name: entry16TaxCreditAmount
fields.label: Сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая отнесению в зачет (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of foreign profit tax subject to tax credit per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in national currency (tenge), for entry row 16 — the smaller of the amounts in columns M and N, recalculated into national currency using the average market exchange rate for the reporting period (if column M's amount governs) or the market exchange rate on the date such foreign profit tax was paid (if column N's amount governs) (column O), per Item 36(15) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. The total value of column O across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.058 I of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry17EntityName
fields.label: Наименование КИК или ПУ КИК
fields.description: The name of the controlled foreign company (КИК) or permanent establishment of a controlled foreign company (ПУ КИК) reported in entry row 17 (column B), per Item 36(2) of the Order's own Rules. The definitions of КИК and ПУ КИК are given in Article 332 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference, not reproduced inline in this Order's text). If the taxpayer controls more than one CFC or CFC permanent establishment, each is listed on its own row.

fields.name: entry17CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the country in which the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 17 is created (incorporated) and tax-resident (column C), per Item 36(3) of the Order's own Rules. If the CFC/PE is created in one country but resident in another, the code of the country of creation (incorporation) is used. Per Item 56 of the same Rules document, this uses the same external "Классификатор стран мира" (Annex 22 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010) classifier already established for this registry's other Form 220.0X country-code fields — not enumerated inline on this form. For a CFC/PE registered in a preferentially-taxed state included in the list approved by Order No. 142, the code is instead that state's own sequence number in that separate list.

fields.name: entry17RegistrationNumber
fields.label: Номер государственной (налоговой) регистрации
fields.description: The state (tax) registration number of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 17 in its country of creation (incorporation) (column D), per Item 36(4) of the Order's own Rules. Where a CFC/PE has both a state registration number and a separate tax registration number, the tax registration number is used.

fields.name: entry17ParticipationCoefficient
fields.label: Коэффициент участия/контроля
fields.description: The overall coefficient (percentage) of the resident taxpayer's direct, indirect, or constructive participation in, or control of, the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 17 (column E), whether held/controlled independently or through a controlled person, determined per paragraph 8 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (an external statutory cross-reference for the calculation method, not reproduced inline in this Order's text), per Item 36(5) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry17CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the currency of the financial profit reported in column G for entry row 17 (column F), per Item 36(6) of the Order's own Rules, which cites Item 55 of the same Rules document — an external classifier ("Классификатор валют", Annex 23 to Customs Union Commission Decision No. 378 of 20 September 2010), not enumerated inline on this form or in its Rules text.

fields.name: entry17ForeignProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль до налогообложения (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit before taxation of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 17, determined per paragraphs 2 and 3 of Article 335 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency (column G), per Item 36(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry17PriorLossesAmount

A resident is not entitled to use losses of a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state.

fields.name: entry18AdjustedProfitAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль с учетом уменьшений и убытков (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 18, before taxation, adjusted for the reductions and losses reported in columns G, H, and I of the same row, in foreign currency, determined as the difference between columns G, H, and I (column G − column H − column I) (column J), per Item 36(10) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry18TaxableProfitForeignAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 18 that is subject to taxation in the Republic of Kazakhstan, in foreign currency, determined as the product of columns J and E (column J × column E) (column K), per Item 36(11) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry18TaxableProfitNationalAmount
fields.label: Финансовая прибыль, подлежащая налогообложению в РК (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The positive amount of financial profit reported in column K for entry row 18, recalculated into national currency (tenge) per paragraph 7 of Article 335 of the Tax Code (column L), per Item 36(12) of the Order's own Rules. The total value of column L across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.045 of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.

fields.name: entry18ForeignProfitTaxAmount
fields.label: Сумма налога на прибыль по финансовой отчетности (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 18, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in foreign currency, conditional on the resident taxpayer holding the supporting documents specified in that paragraph (column M), per Item 36(13) of the Order's own Rules. This amount includes tax withheld at source in the reporting period where the CFC's or PE's pre-tax financial profit included, in the current or a preceding period, income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: entry18ForeignProfitTaxPaidAmount
fields.label: Сумма уплаченного иностранного налога на прибыль (иностранная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of profit tax (foreign income tax) on the pre-tax financial profit of the CFC or CFC permanent establishment reported in entry row 18, computed per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code and actually paid in the foreign state for the reporting period, in foreign currency, conditional on supporting documents (column N), per Item 36(14) of the Order's own Rules. If this differs from the amount in column M, the amount actually paid is used; if the profit was taxed in two or more foreign states, only the amount paid with the highest effective rate is shown here.

fields.name: entry18TaxCreditAmount
fields.label: Сумма иностранного налога на прибыль, подлежащая отнесению в зачет (национальная валюта)
fields.description: The amount of foreign profit tax subject to tax credit per paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code, in national currency (tenge), for entry row 18 — the smaller of the amounts in columns M and N, recalculated into national currency using the average market exchange rate for the reporting period (if column M's amount governs) or the market exchange rate on the date such foreign profit tax was paid (if column N's amount governs) (column O), per Item 36(15) of the Order's own Rules. A resident may not apply paragraph 4 of Article 346 of the Tax Code to a CFC and/or CFC permanent establishment registered in a preferentially-taxed state. The total value of column O across all entries is carried forward to line 220.01.058 I of the schedule kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-01.
